  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

NF1 patients

Make metadata

Audrey

2023-04-24

This file is used to generate :

  • sample_info : dataframe containing sample names, sample path, custom colors…
  • color_markers : named list to give custom colors to cell types
  • cell_markers : named list containing markers for each cell type
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(ggplot2)

.libPaths()
## [1] "/usr/local/lib/R/library"

Preparation

In this section, we set the global settings of the analysis. We will store data there :

save_name = "patients"
out_dir = "."

Sample info

We create a dataframe containing everything except colors.

sample_info = data.frame(
  project_name = c("2019_L", "2020_11", "2020_12", "2020_21",
                   "GSM5404032", "GSM5404033", "GSM5404034",                    # Wu
                   "GSM5404035", "GSM5404036", "GSM5404037", "GSM5404038",      # Wu
                   "GSM5404039", "GSM5404040", "GSM5404041", "GSM5404042",      # Wu
                   "GSM5404043", "GSM5404044",                                  # Wu
                   "GSM5050721"),                                              # Sun
  genotype = "patient",
  tumor_type = c(rep("dyNF", 3), "MPNST",
                 rep("pNF", 9), rep("MPNST", 4),
                 "dyNF"),
  gender = c("F", rep("M", 3),
             "F", "M", "F",
             "F", "M", "M", "F",
             "F", "M", "M", "M",
             "F", "M",
             "M"),
  color = NA,
  origin = c(rep("here", 4),
             rep("Wu", 13),
             rep("Sun", 1)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(sample_type = paste0(genotype, "_", tumor_type)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(tumor_type = factor(tumor_type, levels = c("pNF", "dyNF", "MPNST"))) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(genotype, tumor_type, gender) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(project_name = factor(project_name, levels = project_name)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(unique_id = data.table::rowid(sample_type)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(sample_identifier = paste0(sample_type, "_", unique_id)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(sample_identifier = factor(sample_identifier, levels = sample_identifier)) %>%
  dplyr::select(project_name,  genotype, tumor_type, gender,
                origin, sample_identifier, sample_type, color)

sample_info
##    project_name genotype tumor_type gender origin sample_identifier
## 1    GSM5404032  patient        pNF      F     Wu     patient_pNF_1
## 2    GSM5404034  patient        pNF      F     Wu     patient_pNF_2
## 3    GSM5404035  patient        pNF      F     Wu     patient_pNF_3
## 4    GSM5404038  patient        pNF      F     Wu     patient_pNF_4
## 5    GSM5404039  patient        pNF      F     Wu     patient_pNF_5
## 6    GSM5404033  patient        pNF      M     Wu     patient_pNF_6
## 7    GSM5404036  patient        pNF      M     Wu     patient_pNF_7
## 8    GSM5404037  patient        pNF      M     Wu     patient_pNF_8
## 9    GSM5404040  patient        pNF      M     Wu     patient_pNF_9
## 10       2019_L  patient       dyNF      F   here    patient_dyNF_1
## 11      2020_11  patient       dyNF      M   here    patient_dyNF_2
## 12      2020_12  patient       dyNF      M   here    patient_dyNF_3
## 13   GSM5050721  patient       dyNF      M    Sun    patient_dyNF_4
## 14   GSM5404043  patient      MPNST      F     Wu   patient_MPNST_1
## 15      2020_21  patient      MPNST      M   here   patient_MPNST_2
## 16   GSM5404041  patient      MPNST      M     Wu   patient_MPNST_3
## 17   GSM5404042  patient      MPNST      M     Wu   patient_MPNST_4
## 18   GSM5404044  patient      MPNST      M     Wu   patient_MPNST_5
##      sample_type color
## 1    patient_pNF    NA
## 2    patient_pNF    NA
## 3    patient_pNF    NA
## 4    patient_pNF    NA
## 5    patient_pNF    NA
## 6    patient_pNF    NA
## 7    patient_pNF    NA
## 8    patient_pNF    NA
## 9    patient_pNF    NA
## 10  patient_dyNF    NA
## 11  patient_dyNF    NA
## 12  patient_dyNF    NA
## 13  patient_dyNF    NA
## 14 patient_MPNST    NA
## 15 patient_MPNST    NA
## 16 patient_MPNST    NA
## 17 patient_MPNST    NA
## 18 patient_MPNST    NA

We add custom colors for each sample :

list_palette = list(
  # patients
  patient_pNF = colorRampPalette(c("dodgerblue", "midnightblue")),
  patient_dyNF = colorRampPalette(c("darkseagreen1", "darkseagreen4")),
  patient_MPNST = colorRampPalette(c("mediumorchid1", "mediumorchid4")))

for (sample_type in unique(sample_info$sample_type)) {
  matching_dataset = (sample_info$sample_type == sample_type)
  sample_info[matching_dataset, "color"] = list_palette[[sample_type]](sum(matching_dataset))
}

We visualize the colors :

graphics::pie(rep(1, nrow(sample_info)),
              col = sample_info$color,
              labels = sample_info$project_name)

We save it :

saveRDS(sample_info, file = paste0(out_dir, "/", save_name, "_sample_info.rds"))

Cell types

We define markers for each population of interest :

cell_markers = list(
  "tumor cells" = c("ANK3", "PLP1", "NAV2", "COL18A1", "POSTN", "SOX4", "SERPINE2", "GPM6B",
                    "CALD1", "PDGFA", "TIMP3", "DST", "FBLN2", "LGI4", "SERPINH1",
                    "NR2F2", "ITGB8", "COL5A2", "PTPRZ1", "LAMA4", "GJC3", "TENM3", "COL1A2",
                    "ZNF536", "COL16A1", "DLGAP1", "STARD13", "COL27A1", "SOX10",
                    "TANC2", "ERBB3", "PDZD2", "COL1A1", "COL3A1", "SPARC", "PDLIM4", "EMP1",
                    "DOCK7", "KLF9", "HS2ST1", "NEDD4", "GAS7", "UTRN", "SPECC1", "FRMD4A",
                    "TPM1", "DUSP6", "GAS1", "CXCL12", "PDGFRB", "COL6A1", "HTRA1", "LOXL1",
                    "MAST4", "SLIT2", "COL4A2", "PCOLCE", "CPE", "DKK2", "CAV1", "PRSS23",
                    "TEAD1", "GJA1", "WWTR1", "AEBP1", "NREP", "NID1", "ITGBL1",
                    "ZFHX4", "FBN1", "PCDH19", "DDR2", "SDC2", "MXRA7", "CNN3",
                    "LTBP1", "FOXG1", "LTBP4", "LHFP", "RBFOX2", "TPM2", "RYK", "GPX8",
                    "PXDN", "RCN1", "FKBP9", "KCNA1", "CHL1", "AATK", "KCNA2", "CADM4",
                    "ART3", "CDH19", "CD59", "MAL", "CADM1", "ATP1A2", "PTN", "GATM",
                    "CNP", "CRYAB", "VWA1", "EMP2", "PRNP", "POU3F1", "MBP", "SCN7A",
                    "CKB", "SCD", "MATN2", "HSPG2", "FABP5", "ABCA8", "DLK1"),
  
  "macrophages" = c("C1QC", "MAFB", "FCGR3A", "FCGR3B", "TREM2", "CX3CR1", "TMEM176A",
                    "CYBB", "FCGR1A", "ADGRE1", "TF", "ITGB5",
                    "TLR2", "CEBPA", "C3AR1", "PLA2G7", "ZNF705A", "SIRPA", "CD68", "ITGAM",
                    "LAIR1", "PYHIN1", "CYP4F3", "NCF2", "C1QA", "PID1", "SLC15A3" , "DAB2",
                    "CLEC12A", "HCK", "LRP1", "LILRB3", "CCR1",
                    "LILRB4", "RASSF4", "P2RX4", "GNGT2", "SYK", "IRF5", "LYZ"),
  
  "cDC" = c("FCER1A", "CLEC10A", "CD1C", "FCGR2B", "IL1R2", "LGALS2", "CD1E", "CD1D", "AMICA1",
            "PKIB", "RGS18", "ITGAX", "DAPP1", "GAPT", "IGSF6", "CIITA", "HLA-DOA", "PLD4",
            "STX11", "HCK", "ZNF385A", "DOK2"),
  
  "T cells" = c("CD3E", "CD8A", "CD4", "CD3G", "NKG7",
                "CXCR6", "MS4A4A", "PTPRCAP", "GIMAP4", "SH2D2A", "CD28", "CD2",
                "LCK", "LAT", "BCL11B", "THY1", "GIMAP6", "ITK", "GIMAP1", "SKAP1", "IL2RB",
                "RHOH", "SEPT1"),
  
  "NK cells" = c("KLRB1", "NCR1", "STYK1", "XCL1", "KLRC2", "CA2",
                 "SAMD3", "SATB1", "KLRK1", "KLRD1", "TXK",
                 "CD244", "CD244", "STAT4", "FASLG", "GIMAP5",
                 "GNLY", "NKG7", "PRF1", "GZMB", "XCL2", "HOPX", "GZMA", "CD247"),
  
  "mast cells" = c("MRGPRX2", "TPSB2", "TPSAB1", "FCER1A", "CPA3",
                   "SLC6A4", "CMA1", "KIT", "RAB27B",
                   "GATA2", "IL1RL1", "HDC", "SERPINB1",
                   "LAT2", "VWA5A", "CCL7", "TMEM64",
                   "BASP1", "CCL2", "GCH1", "FNIP1", "LILRB4"),
  
  "B cells" = c("CD79A", "LY6D", "MS4A1", "BANK1", "FCMR", "CCR7", "CD79B", "HLA-DOB", "BCL11A",
                "GIMAP6", "HLA-DOA", "PTPRCAP", "CD37", "HLA-DMB", "LTB", "EBF1", "SCD", "NAPSA",
                "CYTIP", "REL", "POU2F2", "MZB1", "FCRL5", "DERL3", "IGJ", "IGLL5", "PIM2",
                "FAM46C", "TXNDC11"),
  
  "endothelial cells" = c("EGFL7", "CDH5", "EMCN", "CD34", "ESAM", "PLVAP", "APLNR", "RAMP2", "TSHZ2",
                          "SOX18", "ECSCR", "CAV1", "ADGRF5", "PTPRB", "RASIP1", "TIE1", "KDR", "CYYR1",
                          "MMRN2", "FAM110D", "FLT1", "ARHGAP29", "LRG1", "SPARCL1", "VWF", "KANK3",
                          "AQP1", "COL4A2", "COL4A1", "NFIB", "ENG", "MAST4", "S100A16", "CRIP2", "PECAM1",
                          "ABCG2", "CD200", "APBB2", "HSPG2", "GNG11", "IGFBP7", "PRKCDBP", "CAVIN3", "MCAM",
                          "TM4SF1", "PDLIM1", "INSR", "SMAD1", "CD93", "PLEKHG1", "SERPINH1", "SPARC", "IGFBP4",
                          "PPIC", "PLXND1", "COL18A1", "SOX4", "TIMP3", "SNRK", "DST", "EMP1"),
  
  "fibroblasts" = c("MFAP5", "LUM", "FBLN1", "SERPING1", "CILP", "ASPN", "CDH11", "MFAP4",
                    "CCDC80", "SVEP1", "LOX", "IL33", "LOXL1", "CPXM1", "MFAP2", "FBN2",
                    "ISLR", "C1S", "CPXM2", "CLEC11A", "FNDC1", "CD248", "PDPN", "SLIT3",
                    "FIBIN", "COLEC12", "TWIST1", "PDGFRL", "GXYLT2", "PDGFRA", "IGSF10", "CTHRC1",
                    "BICC1", "SNHG18", "FKBP11", "CTSK", "DCN", "ADAMTS2", "FZD2", "MMP23A",
                    "MDK", "SMOC2", "SCARF2", "EBF1", "KDELR3", "FBN1", "IGF1", "C1R",
                    "GPX3", "MRC2", "P3H3", "MGP", "PCOLCE", "CDC42EP5", "ZFHX4", "COL12A1",
                    "COL14A1", "PRRX1", "RBP1", "RHOJ", "LHFP", "GPX8", "COL8A1", "MXRA8",
                    "COL6A2", "EFEMP2", "COL6A3", "SCN7A", "APOD", "FZD1", "LPAR1", "DPYSL3",
                    "PLPP3", "FKBP7", "AEBP1", "SLIT2", "PALLD", "BMP1", "IGFBP6", "FSTL1",
                    "GAS6", "FKBP10", "MAGED2", "CRTAP", "RBMS3", "COL5A1", "PLOD2", "OAF",
                    "MMP2", "GRB10", "COPZ2", "SERPINF1", "PLAT", "TIMP1", "FKBP9", "COL5A3",
                    "S100A16", "RAB34", "SERF1A", "SERF1B", "THBS2", "NPDC1", "MATN2", "FAM114A1", "FSCN1",
                    "MEG3", "MGST1", "ECM1", "COL16A1", "DDAH2"),
  
  "mural cells" = c("DES", "MYH11", "ANO1", "NDUFA4L2", "RGS5", "NOTCH3", "GUCY1A3", "GUCY1A1", "PDE3A",
                    "MYLK", "TPM2", "NRARP", "APOLD1", "MAP3K20", "C11orf96", "TINAGL1", "MYL9",
                    "ARHGEF17", "USP2", "RASD1", "MYO1B", "ASPN", "MUSTN1", "S1PR3", "PTP4A3", "SLC25A25",
                    "PDGFRB", "PPP1R12B", "RASL11A", "RBPMS", "MFGE8", "ADAMTS9", "MGST3", "RASGRP2", "RRAD",
                    "GNG11", "CRISPLD2", "TPM1", "EPAS1", "MPRIP", "HSPB1", "ZFHX3", "BICD2", "SYNE2",
                    "CWC25", "CRTC3", "NOLC1", "LPP", "DLC1", "MAPRE2", "CYGB", "MAFK", "NUDT4",
                    "TNS1", "IRS2", "THY1", "CPE", "RBM4B", "FBXO33", "ARHGEF12"))

lengths(cell_markers)
##       tumor cells       macrophages               cDC           T cells 
##               114                40                22                23 
##          NK cells        mast cells           B cells endothelial cells 
##                24                22                29                61 
##       fibroblasts       mural cells 
##               110                60

Here are custom colors for each cell type :

color_markers = aquarius::color_markers
color_markers = color_markers[names(color_markers) %in% names(cell_markers)]
cell_markers = cell_markers[names(color_markers)] # re-order

data.frame(cell_type = names(color_markers),
           color = unlist(color_markers)) %>%
  ggplot2::ggplot(., aes(x = cell_type, y = 0, fill = cell_type)) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(pch = 21, size = 5) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = unlist(color_markers), breaks = names(color_markers)) +
  ggplot2::theme_classic() +
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "none",
                 axis.line = element_blank(),
                 axis.title = element_blank(),
                 axis.ticks = element_blank(),
                 axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                 axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 10))

These are some markers to assess cell type annotation :

dotplot_markers = list(
  "tumor cells" = c("PLP1", "SOX10", "SOX9", "DLK1"),
  "macrophages" = c("LYZ", "ADGRE1"),
  "cDC" = c("CD1C", "Itgae"),
  "T cells" = c("CD3E", "CD8A", "CD4"),
  "NK cells" = c("KLRB1C", "NCR1"),
  "mast cells" = c("TPSB2", "KIT"),
  "B cells" = c("CD79A", "CD19"),
  "endothelial cells" = c("EGFL7", "PECAM1"),
  "fibroblasts" = c("MFAP5", "LUM"),
  "mural cells" = c("NOTCH3", "DES"))

lengths(dotplot_markers)
##       tumor cells       macrophages               cDC           T cells 
##                 4                 2                 2                 3 
##          NK cells        mast cells           B cells endothelial cells 
##                 2                 2                 2                 2 
##       fibroblasts       mural cells 
##                 2                 2

We save them :

saveRDS(color_markers, file = paste0(out_dir, "/", save_name, "_color_markers.rds"))
saveRDS(cell_markers, file = paste0(out_dir, "/", save_name, "_cell_markers.rds"))
saveRDS(dotplot_markers, file = paste0(out_dir, "/", save_name, "_dotplot_markers.rds"))
